item.name: Ginkgo Fin
item.description:
This minute wavekin cunningly disguises itself as a ginkgo leaf. This would be even more cunning, however, if ginkgo trees actually existed anywhere near the open sea.

[Suitable for printing on small canvases.]

fish.guide: When a school of these emerald-finned wavekin dive and dart in concert, one might almost believe a tree dense with fan-shaped leaves had taken to swimming in the ocean.
